version_description: The singing during the choruses often overlap between the lead singer and the background singers.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am7/D[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Am7/D[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
I remember the way, you used to love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
I remember the days, you used to love me[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You don't appreciate the time[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]          [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
I put into this love affair of ours, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
I couldn't let you walk around[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Am7/D[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Thinking it's alright to let me down[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
I remember (I remember) the way (the way you used to love me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
Baby, I remember the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I remember the days) Oh,  (you used to love me) Yeah--[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                      [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I gave you all my precious love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                        [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
And anything you wanted from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                           [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
     You didn't hear me calling out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Calling for your warm affection after all this time[/tab]


[Bridge 1]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] [ch]C#maj7+5/A[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F9[/ch]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#maj7+5/A[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch]  [ch]F9[/ch]
You    can't       deny what I'm feeling            is real[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]               [ch]C#maj7+5/A[/ch]            [ch]Bdim7[/ch]
And I stood around, (Stood around) stood by your side[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
Went through all the hurt and pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And you turned and walked away[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]                     [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I remember)I remember (the way you used to) you used to love me   Baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I remember the days) (you used to love me) Ohhhh  remember-[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
     Yeah yeah, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]                               [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Am7/D[/ch]
Oh--      Can't give up on the way you used to give it to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Give it to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
       What a feeling, it's so real[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]                     [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I remember) Oh--- (the way you used to) Baby you used to love me, yeah-[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I remember the days you used to love me) Ohhhh  yeah--[/tab]


[Bridge 2]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                      [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You didn't hear me calling out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                        [ch]Am7/D[/ch]
And that's not what love's about (no no)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
I remember you used to love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                     [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You used to love me every day (every day, every day)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                    [ch]Am7/D[/ch]
Now your love has gone away[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
I remember, I remember[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I remember)I remember (the way you used to love me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
You used to love me every day-----[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7/D[/ch]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
(I remember the way) Do you remember, I remember (you used to love me)oh--[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]                                        [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
(I remember) Oh baby, (the way)  you used to walk holding my hand (you used to love me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
'Cause you used to be my man, I remember[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]                    [ch]Gm7[/ch]                                    [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
(I remember) All the way (the days) Didn't hear me calling out) you used to love me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
And that's not what love's about, I remember)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
(I remember the way you used to love me)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/D[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Am7/D[/ch]        NC
(I remember the days) I said I remember (you used to love me)[/tab]
